_comment: Skill 40 Tier-3 operator-buildable scraper config TEMPLATE. Built + validated by scripts/06-build-tier3-config.sh (which runs 05-validate-target.sh before the config can be used live). Fill every <...>. The config MUST carry a tos_url (you reference the target's Terms of Service) and selectors; robots.txt is checked at validation. An invalid/unvalidated config is treated as a Tier-4 honest gap. NO client data; NO fabricated values.
notes: Run scripts/05-validate-target.sh --tier3 <this-file> before live use. If validation fails, treat the target as a Tier-4 honest gap. NEVER fabricate records.
